hero.sub: Mobile apps, web solutions, and technical consulting, delivered on time, with clear communication from start to finish.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.desc: Native Android and iOS apps, or cross-platform. Whichever fits your project, built to ship and built to last.
mobile.d1: Native Android (Kotlin) or iOS (Swift), built to platform standards
mobile.d2: Cross-platform (React Native) when speed to market is the priority
mobile.d3: Biometrics, offline mode, maps, push notifications, camera and more
mobile.d4: Payments, social login, real-time features, and multi-language support
mobile.d5: Google Play and App Store submission and release management

web.title: Web Solutions for Businesses
web.desc: Modern websites for restaurants, shops, studios, and service businesses. Built to be found on Google, with a simple CMS to manage it yourself, or ongoing support for maintenance and updates.
web.d1: Custom built, fast, and SEO-ready so customers can find you
web.d2: CMS included — update your menu, photos, and content yourself, no developer needed
web.d3: Booking, reservations, contact forms and payment integrations
web.d4: Domain, DNS, and hosting setup handled end to end
web.d5: Flexible after launch: self-managed or ongoing support, your choice

arch.title: Architecture & Consulting
arch.desc: Technical guidance for teams and founders who need to get it right. From a first architecture decision to a full system review.
arch.d1: System design from scratch or architecture review of existing systems
arch.d2: Security design, cryptography, secure communication, and compliance
arch.d3: CI/CD pipelines, automated builds, tests, and deployment automation
arch.d4: Translating business needs into clear technical requirements
arch.d5: Code audits and technical due diligence
arch.d6: Available for one-off engagements or ongoing advisory

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.desc: Practical AI features added to your existing product or workflow. No hype, no promises that don't deliver. Just automation and integrations that save your team real time.
ai.d1: ChatGPT, Claude, or open-source models integrated into your app
ai.d2: Document processing, data extraction, and classification
ai.d3: Chatbots and assistants built on top of proven LLM APIs
ai.d4: Workflow automation to cut manual, repetitive work
ai.d5: Scoped honestly: you get what actually works, not a science project

portfolio.label: Selected Work
portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.nda: Most work is under NDA. Descriptions cover the problem solved and tech used, client names withheld.
portfolio.p1desc: Android application deployed across a national government agency, serving tens of thousands of users. Built for real-time field coordination, live location tracking, interactive maps, and strict security requirements.
portfolio.p2desc: Android application for secure digital payment simulation. NFC communication with physical smart cards, cryptographic key generation using Android Secure Element, and blockchain integration for transaction processing.
portfolio.p3desc: Complete web solution for a local restaurant. Reservation management, menu CMS so staff can update content without technical knowledge, and managed hosting.
portfolio.p4desc: Automated document processing pipeline integrated into an existing business workflow. LLM-powered data extraction, classification, and processing, significantly reducing manual processing time.

about.label: Who I am
about.title: About
about.tagline: Solutions that ship. Clear communication. Delivered on time.
about.bio1: I hold a Master's degree in Computer Science and have spent my career building high quality software. Projects for government agencies where data privacy is critical, high-security systems, and applications trusted by hundreds of thousands of users.
about.bio2: My work spans mobile app development, web solutions for businesses, and architecture consulting. Whether you need a mobile app, a website for your restaurant or shop, or a second opinion on your system design, I build and advise with the same standard.
about.bio3: I only take on projects where I am confident I can deliver a quality solution. When I commit to something, I see it through. On time, with clear communication the whole way.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.sub: Have a project in mind or want to explore what's possible? Send a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
